rulings.Case Title: JAMES TRUITT JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Deft Nacco Materials Handling Group, Inc'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents (Inadvertently Taken Off Calendar)
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Nacco Materials Handling Group, Inc'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And Request For Production Of Documents was continued from February 18, 2010 on the court's own motion. If the parties have not fully resolved all issues raised by the motion, they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4pm today stating, without further argument, what issues remain for resolution. In the event that the parties have not informally resolved all issues raised by the motion, the parties must appear at the hearing on February 23. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES TRUITT JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Triple A Machine Shop To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. PLAINTIFFS CAROLE TRUITT, TRENTON TRUITT, KRISTINA WANDZILAK, ASHLEY HELLYER, KATHRYN TRUITT, FRANK MARINOs' Motion To Compel Defendant Triple A Machine Shop To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition is off calendar per request of moving party. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN AYER VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER, PERMANENT PROTECTIVE ORDER
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, February 23, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Douglass Insulation Company, Inc.'s motion for a protective order will be heard in department 206 at 9:30 a.m., not department 220. = (220/HEK)
